arts.ttl: Birmingham City could be without eight players for Bolton Wanderers match as injuries bite
arts.sum: Another two key players were added to Birmingham City's injury list over the weekend after Scott Wright missed the 3-1 win at Lincoln and Emil Hansson limped off. In-form winger Wright was forced to miss the game and Hansson picked up a muscle injury shortly after half-time.

arts.ttl: ‘Left wanting more’ – Birmingham City vs Bolton Wanderers prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Birmingham City vs Bolton Wanderers prediction ahead of the League One clash on Tuesday night. The post ‘Left wanting more’ – Birmingham City vs Bolton Wanderers prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Lincoln City players left 'devastated' by rampant Birmingham City
arts.sum: Two goals from Keshi Anderson and one from Willum Willumsson ensured Blues returned to winning ways after their set-back at Charlton in their previous league game. However, the Imps boss was pleased with the way his team played and admitted they were disappointed to lose.

arts.ttl: Bolton Wanderers man expected to miss Birmingham City trip due to injury
arts.sum: Bolton Wanderers’ George Thomason is a ‘major doubt’ for their upcoming trip to Birmingham City, as detailed in… The post Bolton Wanderers man expected to miss Birmingham City trip due to injury appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Bolton Wanderers facing injury problems ahead of key clash at Birmingham City
arts.sum: Bolton Wanderers have injury concerns over three key first team players as they head to face league leaders Birmingham City on Tuesday night.
